disclaimer: The following information is NOT official. ILDA is not liable for the accuracy of this information. Anyone doing audience scanning is responsible for following all local laws and regulations.
learning_objectives: Identify countries with specific laser show requirements
Know documentation requirements for international laser shows
Recognize regional variations in laser entertainment regulations

content_pages.title: ILDA and International Laser Show Safety

ildA_role.mission: Presenting worldwide audience scanning laws and safety guidance

important_disclaimer.liability: ILDA is not liable for accuracy
important_disclaimer.user_responsibility: Anyone doing audience scanning must follow all local laws and regulations

ilda_member_requirements.affirmation: ILDA Members are required to affirm the safety of their laser shows
ilda_member_requirements.regardless: Regardless of any laws or regulations
ilda_member_requirements.specific_requirement: Affirm safety of audience scanning in writing if performed

regulatory_categories.description: Countries classified by regulatory status for audience scanning

categories.F: Situation unclear, permission usually not required but case-by-case

quiz_questions.question: According to ILDA, who is responsible for following local laws and regulations for laser shows?
quiz_questions.explanation: ILDA states that anyone doing audience scanning is responsible for following all local laws and regulations.

quiz_questions.question: Are ILDA members required to affirm laser show safety even if no laws require it?
quiz_questions.explanation: ILDA Members are required to affirm the safety of their laser shows, regardless of any laws or regulations.

category_f_countries.description: Situation unclear. Usually no permission required, but authorities might unexpectedly deny permission case-by-case.

category_g_countries.description: Each state/canton/province may have its own laws (in lieu of or in addition to federal laws)
category_g_countries.note: None listed at time of document compilation

canada_note.recent_changes: June 2018 laser pointer laws affect Montreal, Toronto, and Vancouver
canada_note.warning: Shows may not be legal in these major cities after 2018 regulations

quiz_questions.question: Which of the following countries is classified as Category F (situation unclear)?
quiz_questions.explanation: China is listed as Category F where the situation is unclear and authorities might unexpectedly deny permission.

quiz_questions.question: Which Canadian cities had laser show restrictions after June 2018?
quiz_questions.explanation: The document notes that after June 2018 laser pointer laws, shows may not be legal in Montreal, Toronto, and Vancouver.

permit_requirements.documentation: All lasers used and techs working must be listed in permit

audience_scanning.general_rule: NO audience scanning allowed in Finland
audience_scanning.exceptions: Special permits may be given for specific shows with audience scanning effects within MPE limits

recent_developments.note: Authority has recently given special permits for audience scanning
recent_developments.condition: Must be within MPE (Maximum Permissible Exposure) limits

quiz_questions.question: Is audience scanning generally allowed in Finland?
quiz_questions.explanation: Finnish regulations clearly state that no audience scanning is allowed in Finland, though special permits may occasionally be granted.

quiz_questions.question: What must be listed in a Finnish laser show permit?
options: All lasers used and techs working
quiz_questions.explanation: In Finland, the permit must list all lasers used and technicians working in the show.

recommendations: Research each country's regulations before booking
Obtain necessary permits well in advance
Have laser equipment documentation ready for customs
Consider hiring local laser safety consultants
Maintain ILDA safety standards regardless of local requirements

member_obligations.written_affirmation: Members must affirm show safety in writing
member_obligations.audience_scanning: If audience scanning is performed, specific written safety affirmation required
member_obligations.mpe_compliance: Must ensure exposures are within MPE limits
member_obligations.measurement: Recommended to have exposure measurements documented

quiz_questions.question: What must ILDA members provide if performing audience scanning?
quiz_questions.explanation: ILDA members performing audience scanning must affirm the safety of their shows in writing.

A.examples: Countries where audience scanning is legal with permits

F.advice: Contact local authorities before performing shows

G.advice: Check both federal and local regulations

glossary.Audience Scanning: Directing laser beams into audience areas
glossary.MPE: Maximum Permissible Exposure - safe exposure limit
